title: Login Workflow
custom_steps:
Navigate to the login page.

Enter a valid username/email using %Username% (e.g., user@example.com).

Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123!).

Click the "Login" or "Submit" button.

Wait for the login process to complete.
custom_expected: User is redirected to the dashboard/home page and is successfully logged in.

title: Change Shipping Option
custom_steps:
Switch between shipping methods.
Verify recalculated price.
custom_expected: Shipping option updates and reflects in the summary.

title: Remove Item During Checkout
custom_steps: Remove one of the items at checkout.
custom_expected: Item disappears from summary and total updates.

title: Multiple Shipping Addresses
custom_preconds: Feature flag for multi-shipping is active.
custom_steps: Assign items to multiple addresses and complete checkout.
custom_expected: Checkout completes successfully and splits delivery.

title: Invalid Payment Token
custom_steps: Use invalid token in checkout API call.

title: XSS in Checkout Fields
custom_steps: Input XSS string in name field.
custom_expected: Script is not executed; input is sanitized.

title: Spanish Translation
custom_steps: Change site language to Spanish and go to checkout.
